instruction_summary: Reorganize the documentation set by removing now-obsolete files, splitting the oversized application specification into smaller topic-focused files, and updating stale entrypoints and references.
actual_work: Reorganized the docs set by turning the oversized application specification into a smaller index plus topic-focused split specs, updating README/read-order entrypoints, removing merged obsolete docs, and correcting stale latest_version-related wording in supporting documents.
changed_files: docs/publish.json 仕様と生成ルール.md
docs/specs/文書ライフサイクルと公開.md
docs/アプリケーション仕様.md
docs/リリース・デプロイ・rollback手順.md
docs/ローカル編集からポータル更新までの最小運用案.md
commands: rg -n "アプリケーション仕様|Webhook・外部API連携方針|Git連携インポート|テキスト系viewer候補メモ|ローカル編集からポータル更新までの最小運用案|publish.json" docs app spec README.md -S
rg -n '^## ' docs/アプリケーション仕様.md
rg -n "semantic version|運用方針補足|テキスト系viewer候補メモ|viewer shell|embedded=1|latest_version" docs README.md -S

tests.command: rg -n "運用方針補足|テキスト系viewer候補メモ" docs README.md app spec -S
tests.details: Remaining matches are only historical references inside prompt logs.

loaded_context: docs/アプリケーション仕様.md
docs/ローカル編集からポータル更新までの最小運用案.md
docs/利用規約・秘密保持の同意管理.md
usage_notes.token_notes: Exact token counts were unavailable from the environment.

quality_notes: Reduced the main application specification from a single large file to a short index plus four focused split-spec files.
Removed obsolete docs that had been superseded by the current viewer and latest_version decisions.
risks: Historical prompt logs still mention deleted docs because they describe past work; those references are intentional.
remaining_concerns: Some long runbooks remain intentionally verbose because they are operational procedures rather than product specs.

signals.note: Created the repo-local prompt log before substantial docs restructuring work.
